critical_fixes.title: ROW FALSE POSITIVE FIX
critical_fixes.description: Prevent ROW keyword (%rowtype syntax) from being extracted as a column name

implementation.dot_notation_filter: Skip matches where column == 'ROW' in prefix.column extraction
implementation.update_clause_filter: Skip matches where col_name == 'ROW' in UPDATE SET col = value

critical_fixes.test_case: UPDATE xy_customer SET ROW = l_cust WHERE customer_id = 123

validation.before: ROW would appear in column list
validation.after: ROW correctly filtered out, only CUSTOMER_ID appears

critical_fixes.title: WHERE CLAUSE COLUMN EXTRACTION
critical_fixes.description: Extract all column names from WHERE, ON, and HAVING clauses across SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE statements

implementation.from_handler: Find FROM table, then extract WHERE columns for that table
implementation.update_handler: Find UPDATE table, then extract WHERE columns for that table
implementation.delete_handler: Find DELETE table, then extract WHERE columns for that table

critical_fixes.test_case: WHERE vat_code = 'STD' AND customer_id = 123 AND amount > 0

examples.sql: SELECT vat_rate FROM xy_vat WHERE vat_code = 'STANDARD'
UPDATE xy_invoice SET amount = 999 WHERE customer_id = 456
DELETE FROM xy_invoice WHERE invoice_id = 789 AND status = 'DRAFT'

critical_fixes.title: IMPLIED FOREIGN KEY INFERENCE
critical_fixes.description: Infer foreign key relationships from DML data flow patterns
affected_areas: Rule B: Cross-package data flow (stub for future)
Rule C: Shared column name pattern detection

rule_a_parameter_threading.description: If p_X_id parameter → table_A.x_id INSERT && table_B.x_id is primary key
rule_a_parameter_threading.logic: Match parameter names to inserted columns; identify source table

rule_c_shared_columns.description: Shared _ID columns across tables → potential FK
rule_c_shared_columns.logic: Find columns in multiple tables; check if queried as filter in target table

validation.note: Rule A and C implemented; Rule B (cross-package) available for enhancement

critical_fixes.title: RESOLVE %TYPE ANCHORS
critical_fixes.description: Resolve %TYPE and %ROWTYPE anchors in variable declarations to their anchor table.column

output_format.anchor_table: Table name where type/rowtype is anchored

critical_fixes.title: NVL/EXPRESSION WRAPPING - FILTER PARAMETERS
critical_fixes.description: Extract columns from wrapped expressions but filter out parameters and local variables

implementation.extraction_logic: Parse function arguments and extract identifiers
filtering_rules: Skip if starts with L_ (local variable)
Skip if starts with V_ (local variable variant)
Skip if starts with G_ (global variable)
implementation.scope_check: Only extract as column if table is in FROM/INTO/UPDATE clause

critical_fixes.test_case: SELECT nvl(vat_rate, 0) FROM xy_vat WHERE vat_code = p_vat_code

examples.reason: Not a parameter; table in scope
p_ prefix identifies it as parameter
l_ prefix identifies it as local variable

methods: INSERT INTO table (col1, col2) - explicit list
UPDATE table SET col1 = value - assignment
SELECT col1, col2 FROM table - select list with function wrapping
filtering_applied: Local variable prefix (L_, V_, G_) filtering (Problem 5)

methods: Shared column name patterns (Problem 3 - Rule C)

changes: _extract_table_columns(): Added ROW filtering in UPDATE SET (Problem 1)
_infer_implied_foreign_keys(): New function for Rule A & C inference (Problem 3)

backward_compatibility.test_coverage: 53/54 tests passing (1 pre-existing failure unrelated to changes)
backward_compatibility.impact: Fixes make column extraction MORE accurate and parameter/variable extraction LESS prone to false positives

example_analysis_output.input_sql: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE process_order(p_customer_id IN NUMBER, p_vat_code IN VARCHAR2) AS l_rate NUMBER; BEGIN SELECT nvl(vat_rate, 0) INTO l_rate FROM xy_vat WHERE vat_code = p_vat_code; INSERT INTO xy_invoice(customer_id, vat_amount) VALUES (p_customer_id, l_rate); END;

validation_summary.problem_1_row_filtering: PASS - ROW never appears as column
validation_summary.problem_5_param_filtering: PASS - P_, L_, V_ prefixes filtered
